text: We produce useful and usable guidance for the NHS and wider health and care system. Our recommendations help practitioners and commissioners get the best care to people, fast, while ensuring value for the taxpayer.
source: NICE (National Institute for Health and Care Excellence)

text: NICE appoints Dr Adrian Hayter as its new chief medical officer Dr Adrian Hayter joins NICE from the Royal College of General Practitioners bringing more than three decades of frontline clinical and national leadership experience to the role.
source: NICE (National Institute for Health and Care Excellence)

text: NICE approves Duchenne muscular dystrophy treatment givinostat after commercial deal sealed Around 530 people in England will benefit from access to the Duchenne muscular dystrophy treatment givinostat, following the successful negotiation of a commercial deal to make the medicine available on the NHS.
source: NICE (National Institute for Health and Care Excellence)

text: 'I no longer feel asthmatic': more than a million people now using new style inhalers The change follows a landmark guideline published jointly in 2024 by NICE, the British Thoracic Society (BTS) and the Scottish Intercollegiate Guidelines Network (SIGN).
source: NICE (National Institute for Health and Care Excellence)

text: Endometriosis fertility care and gynaecological cancer guidance In this episode of NICE Talks, we're covering some of the most significant guidance updates of the year so far for women's health and cancer care. Backing the healthtech that changes lives Ammaarah spent years just surviving with type 1 diabetes. Now she's thriving, with hybrid closed loop technology managing her insulin.
source: NICE (National Institute for Health and Care Excellence)

text: Developing or adopting healthtech? Explore support Best practice resources for practitioners and commissioners. Helping you define, improve and measure quality in health, public health and social care. Resources and recommendations for adult and children’s social care, with example scenarios to help put them into practice.
source: NICE (National Institute for Health and Care Excellence)

text: Explore ways to plan, save money and make decisions on the best ways to use resources. Useful sources of information and advice for healthcare professionals, patients, parents and carers. The British National Formulary (BNF) provides information about the selection, prescribing, dispensing and administration of drugs.
source: NICE (National Institute for Health and Care Excellence)

text: With over 370 topics to choose from, clinical knowledge summaries (CKS) can provide quick answers to clinical questions. Our patient decision aids (PDAs) include treatment options available, likely outcomes, benefits, harms and uncertainties. This World Asthma Day, we're highlighting resources to support better asthma care.
source: NICE (National Institute for Health and Care Excellence)

text: with the British Thoracic Society and Scottish Intercollegiate Guidelines Network, which sets out the latest evidence-based recommendations for asthma. Use our.
source: NICE (National Institute for Health and Care Excellence)
